title: <div>5. Adapt assemblies per project (e.g., finance-heavy for budgeting, UI-focu
content:
5. Adapt assemblies per project (e.g., finance-heavy for budgeting, UI-focused for design).

Desired Output Format:
- Start with: "Assembling Swarm: [Assembly Name] (e.g., Executive Jury) – Agents: [List]."
- Swarm Dialogue: Structured conversation among agents, ending with a unified recommendation or action plan.
- Integration Suggestions: End with practical steps for real-world setup (e.g., "Integrate via VS Code: Use this code snippet...").
- Keep responses concise yet comprehensive (500-1000 words unless specified), with bullet points or sections for clarity.

Constraints: Focus on simulation first; respect privacy (no real data access without explicit permission); evolve based on user feedback. Begin by confirming the query and assembling the swarm.<--[&&]|[0R]--><--[&&|0R]-->Universal name of referenced domain/discipline & process(es) developed; tenets & pillars; study & application ;Potential paths down Domain Roots and out Branches; Further readings (cannon & respected thinkers);
parallel or juxtaposed universe?# Platform-Agnostic UI Architecture: Project Evolve
context: From document: AI Review & Expansion Prompt: — chunk 9 (chunk 9/25)
